title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PAYPAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABADBARAN, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, TO SANTIAGO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 858 / 55 OG No. 23, 4216 (June 8, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2170, April 26, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PAYPAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABADBARAN, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, TO SANTIAGO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Paypay in the Municipality of Cabadbaran, Province of Agusan, is changed to Santiago.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 26, 1959.
